tasks.label: Run C++ with Input & Time
args: clear && timeout 10 /usr/bin/time -v --output=sys.txt './${fileBasenameNoExtension}.out' < input.txt > output.txt && nm '${fileBasenameNoExtension}.out' > binary.txt && objdump -D '${fileBasenameNoExtension}.out' > disassemble.txt && rm '${fileBasenameNoExtension}.out'
